name: public-threat-actor-monitor
title: Public Threat Actor & Ransomware Activity Monitor
description: Tracks public threat actor and ransomware activity and returns metadata rows for recent claims, reporting, targeting, TTPs, confidence, and provenance. Raw leaked data is excluded.

exampleRunInput.body:
{
  "maxRowsPerQuery": 25,
  "includeActivity": true,
  "includeTargets": true,
  "includeTtps": true,
  "includeSources": true,
  "includeDatasets": false,
  "includeCoverageGaps": false,
  "includeHeldRows": false
}
